item.title: Bond Traders Already Had Their Hands Full, ‘Then a War Breaks Out’
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Even before last weekend, Pacific Investment Management Co.’s Daniel Ivascyn was preparing for turbulence. With AI-related jitters reverberating through markets and private credit tremors setting off alarms, the chief investment officer at Pimco and manager of the world’s largest act...
